questions.text: What is the time complexity of accessing an element in an array by index?
questions.explanation: Arrays provide O(1) random access because elements are stored in contiguous memory locations.

questions.text: Which data structure is used for implementing recursion?
questions.explanation: Stack is used for recursion because it follows LIFO principle.

questions.text: What is the worst-case time complexity of quicksort?
questions.explanation: Quicksort has O(n²) worst-case when pivot is always smallest or largest element.
Deadlock is a situation where processes wait indefinitely for resources held by each other.

questions.text: Which scheduling algorithm may cause starvation?
questions.explanation: Priority scheduling can cause starvation of lower priority processes.
